name: ASRock Industrial IMB-A1003 Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - B650 Chipset - 2x262-pin SO-DIMM DDR5 5200 MHz - 1x PCIe x16 (Gen5) - 4x USB 3.2 Gen2 - 2x Gigabit LAN - 4x DisplayPort 1.2 - TPM 2.0 onboard IC - 12~28V DC-In (Lockable DC Jack) (IMB-A1003)
shortName: ASRock Industrial IMB-A1003 Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - B650
description: Industrial-grade Mini-ITX AM5 motherboard with B650 chipset, DDR5 support, and multiple display outputs.
